    A

    addEvent(Scanner) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Prompts the user to enter event information and adds the event to the system.
    addVenue(Scanner) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Prompts the user for venue information and adds the venue to the system.

    R

    readEventCSV(String) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Reads event information from a CSV file and loads events into the system.
    readUserCSV(String) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Reads user information from a CSV file and loads users into the system.
    readVenueCSV(String) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Reads venue information from a CSV file and loads venues into the system.
    registerCustomer(Scanner) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Registers a new customer and adds them to the system.
    registerOrganizer(Scanner) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
    Registers a new organizer and adds them to the system.
    RunTicketMiner - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main driver class for the TicketMiner system.
